'''famovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hibernaculum|hibernaculum]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hibernaculum|hibernaculum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| famovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæmeveth|fæmeveth]] || [[word:fæmevej|fæmevej]] || [[word:fæmevesh|fæmevesh]] || [[word:fæmeve|fæmeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:famomovoth|famomovoth]] || [[word:famomovoj|famomovoj]] || [[word:famomovosh|famomovosh]] || [[word:famomovo|famomovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:famovoth|famovoth]] || [[word:famovoj|famovoj]] || [[word:famovosh|famovosh]] || [[word:famovo|famovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:famofvoth|famofvoth]] || [[word:famofvoj|famofvoj]] || [[word:famofvosh|famofvosh]] || [[word:famofvof|famofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:famovotho|famovotho]] || [[word:famovojo|famovojo]] || [[word:famovosho|famovosho]] || [[word:famovoko|famovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:famovoth|famovoth]] || [[word:famovoj|famovoj]] || [[word:famovosh|famovosh]] || [[word:famovo|famovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:famovothol|famovothol]] || [[word:famovojol|famovojol]] || [[word:famovoshol|famovoshol]] || [[word:famovokol|famovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:famovothotho|famovothotho]] || [[word:famovojojo|famovojojo]] || [[word:famovoshosho|famovoshosho]] || [[word:famovoko|famovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:famovothon|famovothon]] || [[word:famovojon|famovojon]] || [[word:famovoshon|famovoshon]] || [[word:famovokon|famovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:famovothoro|famovothoro]] || [[word:famovojoro|famovojoro]] || [[word:famovoshoro|famovoshoro]] || [[word:famovokoro|famovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
